text_excerpt: In Parliament | Saqib Bhatti Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Saqib Bhatti News My Plan In Parliament Contact A&E for Solihull Chadwick End Speeding Survey Digital ID Survey Meriden and Solihull East Planning Survey Meriden and Solihull East local Issues Survey In Parliament Tweet Here you can see Saqib Bhatti's latest speeches and appearances in Parliament (provided by theyworkforyou): News Saqib joins over 100 politicians condemning China over detention of British citizen Jimmy Lai Wednesday, 20 November, 2024 Saqib has co-signed a letter with over 100 politicians from around the world, including from Canada, Australia and France, urgently demanding that China immediately release 77-year-old British citizen Jimmy Lai.Mr Lai has been held in Hong Kong by the Chinese authorities since February 2021. Saqib signs Holocaust Educational Trust Book of Commitment Thursday, 1 February, 2024 Saqib signed the Holocaust Educational Trust Book of Commitment. Saqib receives entries from local schools for his annual Christmas card competition Monday, 18 December, 2023 Saqib received almost 300 entries for his annual Christmas card competition which was open to all primary schools in the Meriden constituency.
